intended_use: Us2.ca processes acquired transthoracic cardiac ultrasound images to support qualified cardiologists, sonographers, or other licensed professional healthcare practitioners in their diagnosis of cardia
intended_use_full: Us2.ca processes acquired transthoracic cardiac ultrasound images to support qualified cardiologists, sonographers, or other licensed professional healthcare practitioners in their diagnosis of cardiac amyloidosis. Us2.ca is intended for use only in adult patients with increased left ventricular wall thickness, defined as an interventricular septal thickness (IVSd) or left ventricular posterior wall thickness (LVPWd) ≥ 12mm. Us2.ca is not intended to provide a diagnosis and does not replace current standards of care. The results from Us2.ca are not intended to exclude the need for further follow-up on cardiac amyloidosis.
ground_truth: Not explicitly stated; inferred to be clinical diagnosis of cardiac amyloidosis based on study design
other_metrics: Overall yield: 87.1% (proportion of total tested patients for whom the device was able to generate a confident prediction). Subgroup sensitivities and specificities reported by age, gender, race, ultrasound vendor, and data source.
